items.title: What Visa (V)'s Mercuryo Partnership Reveals About Its Web3 Cross-Border Payments Strategy
items.description: In January 2026, Mercuryo announced a partnership with Visa that integrates Visa Direct to enable fast, low-cost crypto-to-fiat off-ramping directly onto Visa credit and debit cards worldwide. By plugging Visa’s real-time payments network into Mercuryo’s non-custodial wallets, exchanges and payment platforms, millions of users can convert digital tokens into local currencies without leaving the services they already use. Next, we’ll examine how integrating Visa Direct into Mercuryo’s crypto...

items.title: Netflix, Visa and 7 Other U.S. Stocks to Ride the International Stock Rally
items.description: International stocks have surged past the S&P 500, helped by a weaker dollar and easier policy abroad. These U.S. companies with big overseas businesses could be next to benefit.

items.title: Visa Strengthens Crypto-to-Fiat Access Through Mercuryo Partnership
